name: Cuban Lunch
recipeIngredient: 7 oz Pkg crushed regular potato chips
recipeInstructions:
This sweet treat is excellent for Christmas or large buffets - anytime you want to serve a special dessert nibble. Melt the chocolate wafers and peanut butter chips together. Add the chopped peanuts and potato chips, mixing thoroughly. Spoon or pour the mixture into small paper baking cups. Store in the refrigerator. Makes 75 servings.
Origin: Homestyles, Canadian Classics
